---
title: "Privacy Notice"
---

## Controller

Ben Spoek, M.Sc.  
Chair of Energy Efficient Buildings and Indoor Climate  
E.ON Energy Research Center  
RWTH Aachen University  
Mathieustr. 10  
52074 Aachen  
Germany

Email: [ben.spoek@eonerc.rwth-aachen.de](mailto:ben.spoek@eonerc.rwth-aachen.de)

## Hosting

This website is hosted with GitHub Pages. When you visit the website, GitHub may process technical access data such as your IP address, request time, requested files, browser information, and referrer information in server logs. This processing is necessary to deliver the website and to maintain the security and reliability of the hosting service.

More information is available in the [GitHub Privacy Statement](https://docs.github.com/en/site-policy/privacy-policies/github-general-privacy-statement).

## No Analytics or Tracking

This website does not use analytics tools, tracking cookies, contact forms, comments, newsletters, or embedded social media widgets.

## Email Contact

If you contact me by email, I process the information you provide in order to answer your request. The data are not used for automated decision-making and are not passed on unless this is necessary to handle your request or required by law.

## Your Rights

Subject to the applicable legal requirements, you may have the right to request access, correction, deletion, restriction of processing, data portability, and objection to processing of your personal data.

## Last Updated

July 2026
